base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_whip_subweapon_standing — a character from 1986 castlevania. wind-up (arm back) / extension (arm forward) / recovery. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame whip/subweapon-use cycle while standing — wind-up (arm back) / extension (arm forward) / recovery; also used for subweapon throw animation (same body pose, subweapon swaps in)
